/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/huffman_gui.dir/huffman/main_gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_gui.dir/huffman/gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_gui.dir/huffman/Funciones/bitstream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_gui.dir/huffman/Funciones/frequency_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_gui.dir/huffman/Funciones/huffman_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_gui.dir/huffman/Funciones/encoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/huffman_gui.dir/huffman/Funciones/decoder.cpp.o -o huffman_gui   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gtkmm3/3.24.10/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/atkmm@2.28/2.28.4/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/glibmm@2.66/2.66.8/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gtk+3/3.24.52/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/cairo/1.18.4/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/at-spi2-core/2.60.3/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/pangomm@2.46/2.46.4/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/cairomm@1.14/1.14.5/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libsigc++@2/2.12.1/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/pango/1.57.1/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/harfbuzz/14.2.0/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/glib/2.88.1/lib  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/gettext/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gtkmm3/3.24.10/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/atkmm@2.28/2.28.4/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/glibmm@2.66/2.66.8/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/gtk+3/3.24.52/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/cairo/1.18.4/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/at-spi2-core/2.60.3/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/pangomm@2.46/2.46.4/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/cairomm@1.14/1.14.5/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/libsigc++@2/2.12.1/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/pango/1.57.1/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/harfbuzz/14.2.0/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/glib/2.88.1/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/gettext/lib -lgtkmm-3.0 -latkmm-1.6 -lgdkmm-3.0 -lgiomm-2.4 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lcairo-gobject -latk-1.0 -lpangomm-1.4 -lglibmm-2.4 -lcairomm-1.0 -lsigc-2.0 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lintl
